articles.title: A 100 leggyakoribb kanji
articles.meta_description: Miért érdemes a leggyakoribb 100 kanjival kezdeni az olvasást és a JLPT alapozást.
articles.keywords: 100 kanji, common kanji, JLPT, Kanjidon, 100 leggyakoribb kanji

faq.question: A 100 leggyakoribb kanji
faq.answer: Miért érdemes a leggyakoribb 100 kanjival kezdeni az olvasást és a JLPT alapozást.

faq.question: Should I learn frequent kanji first?
faq.answer: Yes. Frequency gives you faster reading wins and makes later kanji easier to connect.

sections.content: Miért érdemes a leggyakoribb 100 kanjival kezdeni az olvasást és a JLPT alapozást.
A 100 leggyakoribb kanji
Frequency is a practical filter: the characters you see every day are the ones that give the fastest return. Learn them with words and short sentences, not as isolated drawings.
Examples to notice early
How Kanjidon helps
Kanjidon turns frequent kanji into cards and reviews them with SRS, so the first symbols you learn keep appearing until they feel natural.
